item.title: 新万金作为韩国新兴人工智能门户不断进步
item.summary: Saemangeum seeks to establish itself as a prominent hub for artificial intelligence (AI) data centers by constructing a new subsea cable landing station. This development follows an investment agreement recently signed by the Saemangeum Development and Investment Agency, Jeonbuk Special Self-Governing Province, Gunsan
